name: Yellow Squash Puffs
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cooked and mashed yellow squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked squash and egg, stirring well.
2. In a separate bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt; stir until blended.
3. Add the squash mixture and grated onion to the dry ingredients; stir until all ingredients are evenly mixed.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into hot oil, cooking until golden brown. Turn once during cooking.
5. Drain on paper towels. Yield: about 2 dozen.
